message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
namespace kksffn {
  namespace player {
    interface IPlayer {
        +getCoordinatesOfShips()
        +getGuess()
        +getName()
        +isHuman()
        +updateGuesseses()
        +updateGuesses()
    }

    class APlayer {
        #coordinatesOfShips : HashMap<ShipName, ArrayList<Integer>>
        #isHuman : boolean
        #name : String
        +getCoordinatesOfShips()
        +getGuess()
        +getName()
        +isHuman()
        +updateGuesseses()
        +updateGuesses()
    }

    class AI {
        +AI()
        +getCoordinatesOfShips()
        +getGuess()
        +updateGuesseses()
        +updateGuesses()
        -setName()
    }

    class Human {
        +Human()
        +getCoordinatesOfShips()
        +getGuess()
        -setName()
        -setShips()
    }

    interface ISetShips {
    }

    interface IStrategy {
        +findCoordinates()
        +updateGuesseses()
        +updateGuesses()
    }

    class Strategy {
        -allGuesses : ArrayList<Integer>
        -allHits : ArrayList<Integer>
        -lastHit : int
        -lastHits : ArrayList<Integer>
        -myChances : int
        -myGuess : int
        -numberOfNotRandomMoves : int
        -rand : Random
        -sunkShips : ArrayList<ShipName>
        +findCoordinates()
        +updateGuesseses()
        +updateGuesses()
        -addTheRightCells()
        -addToGuesses()
        -alreadyGuessed()
        -doNotGuessFourth()
        -doNotGuessThird()
        -isNotOnBottom()
        -isNotOnLeftEdge()
        -isNotOnTheRightEdge()
        -isNotOnTheTop()
        -shootNextToFirstHitAgain()
        -thinkOfWhatNotToGuess()
        -tryNearestCells()
        -tryToSinkCarrier()
        -updateGuesses()
    }

    IPlayer <|.. APlayer
    APlayer <|-- AI
    APlayer <|-- Human
    APlayer o-- "sea" ISetShips
    AI o-- "think" IStrategy
    IStrategy <|.. Strategy
  }
}
@enduml
```
